description:
Model a 3-story stepped 'wedding cake' building and install tilted solar panels on the south-facing terraces using Skelion.

Building Specifications (Ensure units are Feet):
1. Level 1 (Ground Floor): Draw a footprint 60 feet wide (East-West) by 50 feet deep (North-South). Extrude up 10 feet.
2. Level 2: Draw a footprint on top of Level 1, aligned to the North, East, and West edges. Make it 60 feet wide and 30 feet deep (North-South). Extrude up 10 feet. (This leaves a 20-foot deep exposed terrace on the South side).
3. Level 3: Draw a footprint on top of Level 2, aligned to the North, East, and West edges. Make it 60 feet wide and 15 feet deep (North-South). Extrude up 10 feet. (This leaves a 15-foot deep exposed terrace on the South side).

Solar Panel Specifications:
1. Select ALL THREE flat roof surfaces (the top roof and the two lower terraces).
2. Open Skelion and set the panel tilt to 20 degrees (tilted up to face South).
3. Insert the solar panels on these surfaces.

When complete, save the model to exactly: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\stepped_terrace.skp
